task_completion.description: Select the line segment in the SolveSpace canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagonal line segment in the main canvas is highlighted (typically changes color to red or yellow), indicating it has been selected by the user.

task_completion.description: Apply a horizontal constraint to the selected line
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line segment snaps from a diagonal orientation to a perfectly horizontal orientation. A horizontal constraint icon (a small horizontal line symbol) may appear next to the line or in the property browser/text window.
A file save dialog window is open and visible over the SolveSpace interface.
The address bar, path input, or breadcrumbs in the save dialog explicitly show the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace'.
The filename input field in the save dialog contains 'side_constrained.slvs', OR the main SolveSpace window title bar updates to show 'side_constrained.slvs' after the save operation is complete.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SolveSpace graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application window with its toolbars, property browser, and canvas being actively used, rather than a text editor or script.

integrity.description: The geometry was genuinely modified in the CAD software
integrity.visual_evidence: The line segment visibly changes from diagonal to horizontal in the canvas, proving the constraint was actually applied rather than the file just being renamed.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI using terminal commands to copy or manipulate the file
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing 'cp' or 'mv' commands being used to create the target file without applying the constraint in the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The initial file 'line_to_constrain.slvs' contains a single diagonal line. Applying a horizontal constraint will visually snap the line to be perfectly horizontal. The final file must be saved exactly to the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/side_constrained.slvs'.
